output:
Usage: cli-anything-libreoffice [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  LibreOffice CLI -- Stateful document editing from the command line.

  Run without a subcommand to enter interactive REPL mode.

Options:
  --json          Output as JSON
  --project TEXT  Path to .lo-cli.json project file
  --help          Show this message and exit.

Commands:
  calc      Calc (spreadsheet) commands.
  document  Document management commands.
  export    Export/render commands.
  impress   Impress (presentation) commands.
  repl      Start interactive REPL session.
  session   Session management commands.
  style     Style management commands.
  writer    Writer (word processor) commands.
